name: TestAddTriggerTesterAction
title: TestAddTriggerTesterAction
description: Adds a trigger to a tester action previously created with TestCreateTesterAction. Every trigger triggers the call of the CAPL callback of its tester action cyclically or when the value of the signal, system variable, environment variable updates.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: The handle of the tester action to add the trigger.
